title: Dulux Non Drip Gloss Paint For Wood And Metal - Pure Brilliant White 750 ml
description: From the manufacturer Dulux Non Drip Gloss High Sheen Paint For Wood And Metal Dulux Non Drip Gloss is a beautiful gloss paint that provides long-lasting protection and is easy to use thanks to its Non Drip formulation. It is self-undercoating, hardwearing, wipeable and suitable for use on interior wood and metal, including radiators. Apply 1 or 2 coats with a brush, leave at least 16 hours between coats. TIP: if the colour change is strong, more coats may be required. edge technology has been used in the development of this product, the nature of solvent based paints means that they will discolour over time. The rate of discolouration is faster in areas with low natural or UV light. For long lasting whiteness we recommend the use of a water based formulation , available in the Dulux Quick Dry range Tips and Advice Preparing the surface: Make sure the surface is clean (no dirt or grease) and dry. If a bare surface, apply the appropriate Dulux Primer. Treat any knots in wood with a suitable knotting solution. If the surface is damaged, repair using the appropriate Polycell product. When painting radiators, make sure that they are cold. Cleaning: For best results, scrape off excess paint from the brush and clean with Polycell Brush Cleaner. Storing : Store paint in dry conditions and protect from extreme temperatures.
